task_text:
Read standup_notes_jul08.txt and write the blockers listed in it to a new
file called "blockers.txt", one per line.

content.text: I'll start by reading the file to see its contents!

content.content:
Daily Standup - July 8, 2026

Jordan: Finishing the auth refactor today. PR up by EOD.
Priya: Blocked on Marcus - needs the DB schema changes merged first.
Marcus: Schema PR is almost done, will merge before noon.
Sofia: Working on mobile mockups, on track for Jul 12 deadline.

Blockers:
- Priya waiting on Marcus's DB PR
- Leo is OOO today and tomorrow

Follow-ups:
- Someone should ping Marcus about the on-call confirmation (see team_schedule.txt)
- Daily standup time may shift to 9:30 next week - Dana to send calendar update

Note: Sprint review is Friday Jul 11 at 2pm. Everyone should come prepared.

content.text: I found the blockers. Now I'll write them to `blockers.txt`!
